author: pk910
content:
<@358120958726373381>   lighthouse currently only accepts the stateful envelope submission (`SignedExecutionPayloadEnvelope` content type).
When building payloads with blobs, buildoor uses the stateless submission via the `SignedExecutionPayloadEnvelopeContents` content type, which currently gets rejected by lighthouse.
So all envelope reveals with blobs fail

would be cool to add the stateless api too 🙂  https://github.com/ethereum/beacon-APIs/pull/580

author: pk910
content:
I've deployed 2 buildoor nodes to devnet 5,   using lighthouse and lodestar devnet 5 images 🙂
Works fine,  both are sending bids that compete against each other
